description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a large, wall-spanning unit with a combination of open shelving, closed cabinets, and integrated appliances, all finished in a modern mix of wood and matte blue-gray panels. The upper section showcases a variety of open cubbyholes and geometric shelving, ideal for display or storage, while the lower section is composed of multiple drawers and cabinets for concealed storage. A central countertop workspace is flanked by two high stools, suggesting a bar or kitchen island function, with a matching wood and blue-gray finish. The countertop includes a built-in cooktop and sink, with overhead pendant lighting fixtures visible above. The cabinetry's design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimalistic hardware, emphasizing both functionality and aesthetics. The rear and side views reveal the full depth and structure of the cabinetry, including the solid back panels and the layered construction of the shelves and drawers.
description: A modern, wall-spanning cabinetry set with open shelving, closed cabinets, and a central island with stools, finished in wood and blue-gray panels. Features include geometric shelving, integrated appliances, and minimalistic hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelving, closed cabinets, a central island with two stools, and integrated appliances.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry and the profile of the island and stools.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panels and the layered construction of the cabinetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the cabinetry and the island, with pendant lights visible.
attribute_cabinet_type: kitchen wall and base cabinet set with island
attribute_door_configuration: combination of open shelf and double door
